title: Passengers on Hantavirus Cruise Ship Will Disembark in Tenerife and Return to Home Countries
summary_full: The cruise ship will arrive on the island of Tenerife, part of the Canary Islands of Spain, officials said. All of the passengers will then be evacuated to their home countries.
summary_public: The cruise ship will arrive on the island of Tenerife, part of the Canary Islands of Spain, officials said. All of the passengers will then be evacuated to their home countries.
